docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,300.00 FILED BY CASTLE LARRY AS TO DEFENDANT NEAL RAYMOND ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-16-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT NEAL RAYMOND IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT CASTLE LARRY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
